_notes: Meta descriptions injected by roen-minimal/inc/seo-meta.php. Each entry: 150-160 chars, third-person voice, no first-person pronouns. Audited against brand never_say list.

front_page.description: Roen — handmade jewelry from a small Atlanta studio. Bracelets, beaded pieces, and evil eye designs, each sketched, soldered, and polished by hand.

pick.description: Five bracelets handpicked to match your style. A curated mix of beaded, charm, and evil eye pieces — every box assembled by hand in Atlanta.

bracelet.description: Bracelets from Roen — beaded, charmed, evil eye, and stretch styles. Each one strung, soldered, and finished by hand in a small Atlanta studio.

necklace.description: Necklaces from Roen — beaded, charm, and pendant styles. Each one strung, soldered, and finished by hand in a small Atlanta studio.

shop.description: Shop Roen — handmade bracelets, beaded pieces, evil eye designs, and necklaces. Every item designed and made by hand in a small Atlanta studio.

noindex_rules._reason: Tag archives are thin/duplicate content; paginated archives split link equity. Both should noindex,follow to preserve crawl budget for products + categories.
